# Projonexa

Projonexa is a technology-driven innovation platform based in Maharashtra, India.
We provide final year project development, AI/ML systems, startup MVP development, and custom software delivery.

## Preferred Entry Points

- https://projonexa.com/
- https://projonexa.com/services
- https://projonexa.com/pricing
- https://projonexa.com/faq
- https://projonexa.com/affiliate-program
- https://projonexa.com/contact

## Student Affiliate Program (passive income for students in India)

- Program overview & FAQ: https://projonexa.com/affiliate-program
- Apply to join: https://projonexa.com/inquiry/affiliate
- Student project inquiry (with optional referral code): https://projonexa.com/inquiry/students

Projonexa offers a student affiliate program: enrolled students in India refer peers who need final-year or academic project help. When a referred inquiry becomes a fixed project deal with Projonexa, the affiliate earns 6–10% commission. Applicants receive a unique referral code and URL (on-screen, plus email and WhatsApp). After five successful referred projects, affiliates unlock a dashboard to track per-project commission and request payouts (target processing within 12 hours of payout request, per program terms).

## Key Capabilities

- Final year and academic project delivery
- AI/ML and data-backed systems
- Web and mobile application development
- IoT and embedded-integrated solutions
- Startup MVP and custom product engineering
- Student affiliate / referral program
